title: Luffy Carries Oden’s Will Forward
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #9, Kaido, Killer, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No Measly East Blue Cook Ever Could!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As the former sous-chef of a floating restaurant proud to sail the East Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I can't let that insult slide, monsieur rube!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it means boosting the happiness of a lovely lady...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...How could I not give a helping hand?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're going home with your head held high, old man!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: HAH! Ain't you full of herself, kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What can a novice like you do?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you really are a cook, you'd know not just anyone can handle Dragon salmon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...only gets me even more fired up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only a first-rate chef on the Grand Line would even try!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hearing you put it that way....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's as fluid as the sea, flowing from one step to the next!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like the fish is dancing on the cutting board!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 33 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
